channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: The Pentagon has launched a formal investigation into Iranian school blast
item.description: A military assessment suggests a U.S. Tomahawk cruise missile was responsible for at least 165 deaths at an Iranian girls' school, according to a U.S. official who was not authorized to speak publicly.
item.content:encoded: A military assessment suggests a U.S. Tomahawk cruise missile was responsible for at least 165 deaths at an Iranian girls' school, according to a U.S. official who was not authorized to speak publicly.
item.dc:creator: Quil Lawrence

item.title: Rebecca Gayheart Dane on caring for her late husband, Eric Dane, and synthetic voices
item.description: The wife of 'Grey's Anatomy' actor Eric Dane says caring for him gave her an "extra dose" of compassion for others.
item.content:encoded:
The wife of 'Grey's Anatomy' actor Eric Dane says caring for him gave her an "extra dose" of compassion for others.

(Image credit: Alberto E. Rodriguez / Getty Images for Chrysalis Butterfly Ball)
item.dc:creator: Juana Summers

item.title: Iran war leads to historic closing of the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: On day 12 of U.S.-Israeli war against Iran, we learn more about the importance of the shipping lane: the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: On day 12 of U.S.-Israeli war against Iran, we learn more about the importance of the shipping lane: the Strait of Hormuz.
item.dc:creator: Linah Mohammad

item.title: Australia shelters 7 Iranian women's soccer team members, but 1 wants to go back
item.description: Australia says it's given asylum to seven members of the Iranian national women's soccer team, but one has asked to return to Iran.
item.content:encoded: Australia says it's given asylum to seven members of the Iranian national women's soccer team, but one has asked to return to Iran.
item.dc:creator: Kristina Kukolja

item.title: Amid U.S.–China chip rivalry, open-standard designers warn their vision is at risk
item.description: The U.S. and China have been trying to dominate semiconductor design and manufacture. But the creators of one type of semiconductor design wanted to make it free for anyone in the world to build upon.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. and China have been trying to dominate semiconductor design and manufacture. But the creators of one type of semiconductor design wanted to make it free for anyone in the world to build upon.
item.dc:creator: Emily Feng

item.title: Oscar nominee Delroy Lindo on finding the pain and heartache rooted in the Blues
item.description: NPR's Scott Detrow speaks with actor Delroy Lindo about his Oscar nominated role in the supernatural thriller Sinners.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Scott Detrow speaks with actor Delroy Lindo about his Oscar nominated role in the supernatural thriller Sinners.
item.dc:creator: Marc Rivers

item.title: High up in an old-growth redwood, a condor couple appears to be tending to an egg
item.description: Scientists say a pair of condors are likely tending to an egg high up in a California redwood — the first time that's happened there in more than a century. A Yurok wildlife official gives an update.
item.content:encoded: Scientists say a pair of condors are likely tending to an egg high up in a California redwood — the first time that's happened there in more than a century. A Yurok wildlife official gives an update.
item.dc:creator: Scott Detrow

item.title: Biden's former national security advisor weighs in on the path forward in Iran
item.description: NPR's Scott Detrow talks with Jake Sullivan, who served as national security advisor under President Biden, about the Trump administration's messaging about the Iran war, and how it might resolve.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Scott Detrow talks with Jake Sullivan, who served as national security advisor under President Biden, about the Trump administration's messaging about the Iran war, and how it might resolve.
item.dc:creator: Scott Detrow

item.title: It took a volunteer to get a small town senior center off the ground
item.description: When a small town with a lot of senior citizens had no community services for them, one volunteer stepped up and created a thriving program.
item.content:encoded: When a small town with a lot of senior citizens had no community services for them, one volunteer stepped up and created a thriving program.
item.dc:creator: Laura Palmisano

item.title: Just in time for Easter, egg prices drop sharply
item.description: A year ago, eggs were the poster child for runaway grocery prices. But egg prices have fallen sharply in the last 12 months.
item.content:encoded: A year ago, eggs were the poster child for runaway grocery prices. But egg prices have fallen sharply in the last 12 months.
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley
